column8: It is a pleasure working with Chris and With Direction, LLC.  Organizing interpretation services is quick, efficient, and professional. The IS and ASL interpreters are skilled, flexible, and punctual.

column6: Theatre Interpreting Workshop by Singapore Repertory Theatre
column8: The Theatre Interpreting Workshop, hosted by Singapore Repertory Theatre, was a comprehensive and eye-opening experience. Designed for both Deaf and hearing interpreters, it provided hands-on practice, valuable feedback, and deep insights—especially since most of us in Singapore have little to no experience in theatre. Christopher’s extensive background as both an interpreter and a theatre actor brought a unique depth to the training, offering valuable perspectives on providing access while honouring the spirit of the show. His engaging and supportive approach made complex concepts accessible, empowering us with practical skills and greater confidence in theatrical interpretation. With Direction, LLC delivers exceptional training, and Christopher’s passion and expertise made this workshop an invaluable opportunity for interpreters in Singapore to develop their skills.
